metadata.description: Public Claude Code plugins by Mikko Parkkola.

plugins.name: trvl
plugins.description: Travel search and planning: flights, hotels, trains, ferries, price alerts. No API keys.

plugins.name: glyphdown
plugins.description: Token-cost reduction for Claude Code: lossless output compression, stacks on prompt caching.

plugins.name: anti-ai-tell
plugins.description: Writing discipline that keeps prose from reading as AI-generated: constraints, linter, checklist.
